title: borreria exserta
intro: Borreria exserta, also known as the Yellow Borreria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antihelmintic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and intestinal parasites. The health benefits of Borreria exserta include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Borreria exserta can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make teas and tinctures.
